women.name: Welfare Services for Women
women.description: The scheme aims to provide welfare support and financial assistance for women in distress, including widows, victims of violence, trafficked women, and economically disadvantaged women.

women.name: Shelter Home For Women (SHW)
women.description: The scheme "Shelter Home for Women (SHW)" provides temporary shelter and support to women who have no family or social support systems to rely on and rehabilitate the women socially and economically by the provision of skill training, and counselling.

women.name: Individual loaning scheme: Haryana Women Development Corporation
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to women for economically viable projects. Through this scheme, subsidies and loans are provided to eligible women for projects costing.

women.name: Maternity Benefit for Women Beneficiaries
women.description: The "Maternity Benefit for Women Beneficiaries" scheme under the Nagaland Building and Other Construction Workers' Welfare Board provides financial assistance to pregnant women registered as beneficiaries and wives of registered beneficiaries. The assistance can be availed up to two times.

women.name: Pension To Widows And Destitute Women-Chandigarh
women.description: Under the Pension To Widows And Destitute Women scheme To provide financial assistance to Widows and Destitute Women of Chandigarh.

women.name: Sikkim Unmarried Women Pension Scheme
women.description: The scheme “Sikkim Unmarried Women Pension Scheme (SUWPS)” was launched in 2013 by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim. Under this scheme, the unmarried women of Below Poverty Line (BPL) families in Sikkim would receive a pension of ₹ 2000/- per month.

women.name: Women Scientist Scheme-B
women.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates with break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. Women scientists who wish to apply under this scheme are required to develop their own project/proposals for scientific and technological solutions

women.name: Amma Two Wheeler Scheme for Working Women
women.description: The Amma Two-wheeler is a scheme that will empower working women in Tamil Nadu State.

women.name: Zero Ticket Bus Travel Scheme for Women
women.description: The scheme aims to provide to eligible women/ transgender beneficiaries of Tamil Nadu under the Zero Ticket Bus Travel Scheme for Women, Free of Cost Travel in Government of Tamil Nadu Buses. No Need to Pay any Fare up to 30 Kilometers.

women.name: Self-Employment loan scheme for Minority Widows, Divorcees / Abandoned Women
women.description: The scheme aims to provide self-employment loans to women from minority communities. Financial assistance with a 20% subsidy is provided to widows, divorced women, and abandoned women from minority communities. The scheme is implemented by the KSMDFC.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa - Vulnerable Women
women.description: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa- Vulnerable Women" was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura to provide financial assistance to Vulnerable Woman in need of special care, support or protection because of age, disability.

women.name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Working Women
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to working women through loans up to ₹20,000/- at a 12% interest rate via District Central Cooperative Banks and their branches.

women.name: Nari Shakti Puraskar - National Award for Women
women.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
women.description: The award aims to acknowledge the achievements of women & recognize their contributions to society and the nation. The award is conferred annually on individuals in recognition of their exceptional service towards the cause of women’s empowerment, particularly for vulnerable and marginalized women.

women.name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Women In Distress
women.description: ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir where financial assistance is provided to Old Age Persons, Widows, Divorcees, Women in Distress, Transgenders, and Physically Handicapped Persons.

women.name: New Swarnima Scheme For Women
women.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
women.description: A term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for women entrepreneurs from backward classes to obtain a loan of up to ₹ 2,00,000/- @ 5% per annum, thereby providing them social & financial security.

women.name: Government Hostel for Working Women/ Girl Students
women.description: The scheme aims to provide suitable, inexpensive, and safe accommodation to women employed in government offices, organizations, and firms, as well as girl students studying in colleges. Essential facilities include a cot with mattress, lockable cupboards, television, newspapers, magazines, etc.

women.name: Assistance to Women for Trainer and Coaches Training Course
women.description: The scheme “Assistance to Women for Trainer and Coaches Training Course” by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to encourage women's participation in sports by providing financial assistance for diploma courses in sports education.

women.name: Pension to Unmarried Poor, Incapacitated Women of Age 50 years and above
women.description: The 'Pension to Unmarried Poor, Incapacitated Women of age 50 years and above' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a pension of ₹1,000/- to unmarried, poor, incapacitated women of age 50 years and above.

women.name: Marriage Assistance To Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)
women.description: The scheme “Marriage Assistance to Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

women.name: Financial Assistance To Poor & Needy Widow Women
women.description: "Financial Assistance to Poor & Needy Widow Women" is a scheme by the Department of Social Welfare, Govt. of Manipur. The objective of the scheme is to provide social security by way of financial assistance to widows in the age group of 18-40 years.

women.name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Women Entrepreneurs
women.description: The scheme aims to provide loans of up to ₹5,00,000/- at an interest rate of 12% (subject to change) for women entrepreneurs through District Central Cooperative Banks and its branches.

women.name: Vocational Training Of Destitute Women And Adolescent Girls
women.description: "Vocational Training of Destitute Women and Adolescent Girls" is a scheme by the Social Welfare Department, Govt. of Manipur. In this scheme, a 6-months training is provided in the Trades such as Tailoring & Cutting, Embroidery, and Computer. This is a State Sponsored Scheme.

women.name: Women Helpline
women.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
women.description: "Women Helpline" provides 24X7 emergency and non-emergency response through the telephonic short-code 181 to women

women.name: Cash Award to Women Players of the State
women.description: The scheme "Cash Award to Women Players of the State" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to encourage and support talented female athletes through annual cash scholarships for those who excel at state and national level competitions.

women.name: Scheme For Women Entrepreneurs Mahila Udyam Nidhi (MUN)
women.description: The scheme aims to meet the equity gap for new Small Scale Industrial units and service activities promoted by women entrepreneurs. It offers Term Loans and Seed Capital for projects costing up to ₹10,00,000/-.

women.name: Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme For Women Farmers And Farmers
women.description: The scheme “Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme for Women Farmers and Farmers” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

women.name: Uttarakhand Compensation Scheme for Women Victims/Survivors of Sexual Offences and Other Crimes, 2020
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance/compensation ranging from a minimum of ₹3 lakh to a maximum of ₹10 lakh to women victims and survivors of sexual offences, as well as to other women victims of crime in the state.

women.name: Biotechnology Career Advancement And Re-orientation (BioCARe) Programme For Women Scientists
women.description: Biotechnology Career Advancement and Re-orientation (BioCARe) Programme, a special scheme of the Department of Biotechnology (DBT), Ministry of Science & Technology, the government of India aims to enhance the participation of women scientists in India towards research in Biotechnology.

women.name: Internship Programme for Women Students / Scholars / Social Activists / Teachers
women.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
women.description: The Ministry of Women and Child Development launched the Internship Programme aims to harness the talent of the trainees, giving them an opportunity to work towards bringing more efficiency in the implementation of the schemes.

women.name: Scheme for Relief and Rehabilitation of Women Acid Victims
women.description: Under the scheme, the acid attack victim is entitled to receive 100% free medical treatment from government or government-approved hospitals. Additionally, an ad-hoc relief of ₹1.00 lakh is provided to the acid attack victim, which is later reimbursed by the Women and Child Development Department.

women.name: Women Scientist Scheme-A
women.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering, preferably those having a break in career (minimum two years) and not having regular employment, to explore possibility of re-entry into the profession.

women.name: Women Scientist Scheme-C
women.description: A scheme by MoST for female candidates with a break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. 1-year training is provided in Intellectual Property Rights (IPRs), patent search, know-how, drafting, filing, trademarks, trade secrets, and copyright.

women.name: Procedure for Admission to Government Women Welfare and Rehabilitation Centre and Women's Home
women.description: The scheme aims to provide support to women above 18 years of age who are orphans, destitute, abandoned, found on roads, or mentally and physically disabled. Such women are provided with clothing, food, accommodation, medical care, counselling, entertainment, and training facilities free of cost.

women.name: Deserted Women Pension Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension to Abandoned married women, mentally ill husband/wife & destitute unmarried women in the state. Under this scheme, beneficiaries receive a pension of ₹1,200/- per month, & in case of mental disability (spouse), the amount is ₹1,400/- per month.

women.name: Widow / Destitute Women Pension Scheme - Punjab
women.description: Punjab State Government started a pension for widow and destitute women.

women.name: Tailoring Training To Scheduled Caste & Backward Classes Widows/Destitute Women/Girls
women.description: The aim of the scheme is to enable Scheduled Caste Widows/girls/destitute women for self-employment. A stipend of Rs.600/- P.M. and raw material costing Rs.300/- per month per trainee is given to a trainee for getting training from the nearest Kalyan Kendar run by this department.

women.name: Special Incentive Scheme for Women of Tharu, Boksa and Other Tribes (For Training and Marketing)
women.description: The scheme aims to empower tribal women artisans through specialized training and marketing opportunities and ensures the provision of financial assistance for travel, logistics, and stall rent for participating artisans.

women.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana (for women only) GNTDNT
women.description: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women of nomadic and denotified castes and support women entrepreneurs doing independent business. Through this scheme, microfinance is provided to women beneficiaries to pursue a business/occupation of their choice.

women.name: Organization of Various Conclaves and Felicitations to Encourage Women, Women Scientists, Teachers and Young Students
women.description: The scheme aims to promote and enhance scientific attitude and skill development of women, women scientists, teachers, and young students of the state by organizing conclaves and felicitating them.

women.name: Post Doctoral Fellowship To Women Candidates
women.description: The UGC has initiated a scheme of “Post Doctoral Fellowship for Women” to those candidates, who are unemployed holding Ph.D. degree in their respective subject areas with an aim to accelerate the talented instincts of the women candidates to carry out the advanced studies and research.

women.name: New Swarnima Yojana for Women (GTKVN)
women.description: The scheme aims to promote economic upliftment of women from Thakor & Koli communities living below poverty line by supporting them in self-employment ventures. Under this scheme, 100% financial support up to ₹1,00,000/- is provided to eligible women for starting a business/trade of their choice.

women.name: Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research
women.description: The scheme “Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research (WISER)” aims to build scientific capacity, retain and promote women researchers in India & Germany by utilizing complementary expertise in science, technology, innovation and research partnerships.

women.name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Revamped Micro Credit Loan for Women Vendors of Flower, Vegetable, Fruit etc.
women.description: The scheme provides revamped micro credit loans through District Central Cooperative Banks to support women vendors selling flowers, vegetables, fruits etc. Loans range from  ₹100/- to  ₹5,000/- with an interest rate of 11%.

women.name: Assistance Scheme for Handloom Spinning-Weaving Women Workers
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to traditional women workers whose primary occupation is handloom weaving, spinning, or related weaving activities. Under this scheme, eligible women workers are provided with handloom equipment, including looms & related equipment, worth upto ₹25,000/-.

women.name: Scheme Of Assistance To Women Entrepreneurs (Mahalir Udavi)
women.description: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance to new or existing Micro Enterprises and Small Scale Industry units exclusively promoted by women or having a majority of women entrepreneurs. It provides term loans and working capital assistance up to 75% of the project cost.

women.name: IMA Nongthangleima Yaipha Tengbang Scheme
women.description: The "Ima Nongthangleima Yaipha Tengbang Scheme" provides support to approximately 4 lakh women in Manipur who are above the age of 40 years. The scheme aims to empower these women by offering crucial financial assistance, thereby aiding them in pursuing diverse livelihood options.

women.name: Annapurna Yojana
women.description: The scheme “Annapurna Yojana” implemented by the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department, Government of West Bengal aims to provide assured monthly financial assistance to eligible women residing in the state for their empowerment and socio-economic upliftment. Under the scheme, el

women.name: Pension to Widows and Destitute Women
women.description: Under this scheme, widows and destitute women aged 18 years and above are eligible for a pension if they are domiciles of Haryana and have been residing in the state for at least one year at the time of application submission.

women.name: Gaura Shakti Yojana
women.description: The objective of scheme is to prevent crimes against women & girls and to ensure prompt action in case of any incident. Under this, a three-tier support system is set up with Mahila Desks at police stations,Women Safety Helpline & Counselling Cells at district level, & a State Women Safety Helpline.

women.name: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme
women.description: The scheme “The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands to provide financial assistance to the poorest and destitute women in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

women.name: Financial Assistance To Women And Girl Acid Attack Victims
women.description: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Women and Girls Acid Attack Victims” by the Govt. of Haryana, provides financial assistance in the form of a monthly pension to the women/girls residing in Haryana who have suffered disfigurement of any part of the body or have become disabled due to acid attack.

women.name: Delhi Pension Scheme To Women In Distress (Widow Pension)
women.description: Delhi Pension Scheme to Women in Distress is a welfare scheme to provide social security by way of financial assistance to widows, divorced, separated, abandoned, deserted or destitute women in the age group of 18 years of lifelong who do not have adequate means of subsistence and are poor & needy.

women.name: Subsidized Scheme for Widows: Haryana Women Development Corporation
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Haryana Domiciled Widow, Divorced, and Legally Separated Women. Through this scheme, a subsidy on the total loan is provided.

women.name: Training Program for A-HELP Women Workers - Uttarakhand Livestock Development Board
women.description: The scheme aims to provide community-service-based skill development and employment opportunities for women in the field of animal husbandry. Eligible women members of Self-Help Groups under the Uttarakhand State Rural Livelihood Mission can apply.

women.name: New Swarnim Yojana (for women only) GNTDNT
women.description: The scheme aims to achieve economic upliftment by providing self-employment with dignity. Through this scheme, loans for self-employment at an annual interest rate are provided to women beneficiaries of nomadic and denotified castes living below the poverty line.

women.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
women.ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
women.description: This is a micro-financing programme aiming towards the empowerment of women from underprivileged backgrounds or economically backward areas. Through this scheme, these women can apply for a loan at a nominal interest rate to fulfil their dreams and goals and gain financial independence.

women.name: Government Service Home - Tamil Nadu
women.description: The scheme "Government Service Home" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide institutional care to widows, destitute women, deserted women, adolescent girls and differently-abled women and their children.

women.name: Government Working Women’s Hostel
women.description: The scheme "Government Working Women’s Hostel" is an initiative by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide safe accommodation facilities to working women who live far away from their families, belonging to lower and middle-income groups.

women.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Bunkar Yojana
women.description: DDUBY is a government initiative in Arunachal Pradesh to provide affordable credit to women weavers, offering an interest subvention of 7% on short-term loans and working capital requirements.

women.name: Financial Assistance for Self-Marriage of Registered Women Workers (HBOCWWB)
women.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹50,000/- is provided to registered women workers for arranging their own marriage who have a minimum one-year regular membership.

women.name: Indo-French Postdoctoral Research Programme for Women in Science
women.description: This programme will provide a platform for women candidates to engage & work with Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

women.name: Indo-French Visiting/Mobility Programme for Women in Science
women.description: This programme will encourage women candidates to work with the Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme-Madhya Pradesh
women.description: The Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme is being operated to provide financial support to widowed women living below the poverty line.

women.name: Ganga Swarupa Punah Lagna Arthik Sahay Scheme
women.description: The scheme supports remarried women who are beneficiaries of the Ganga Swarupa Pension Scheme, aiming to reintegrate them into society with financial support.

women.name: Nawabihan Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to provide support and assistance, including legal aid and shelter, to women who are victims of domestic violence, as mandated by the Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act 2005. This scheme ensures that affected women receive the necessary resources for their well-being.

women.name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Pension for Women in Distress
women.description: The scheme is implemented by the Social and Tribal Welfare Department, Administration of Union Territory of Ladakh. Under this scheme, a financial assistance of ₹1,000/- per month is provided as a pension to destitute widows, divorced, or deserted women with no source of income.

women.name: Indira Mahila Shakti Udyam Protsahan Yojana
women.description: This scheme launched by the Rajasthan government to empower women by providing them with loans and other financial assistance to start or expand their businesses

women.name: Sanitary Pad Supply Scheme
women.description: The "Sanitary Pad Supply Scheme" by the Women, Child Development & Social Security Department, Government of Jharkhand, aims to promote hygiene and health among women and adolescent girls. It provides free sanitary pads quarterly to women aged 20–40 years through Anganwadi centers.

women.name: Tejaswini-the Radiant
women.description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to the young women for setting up gainful self-employment ventures, suited to their skills, training, aptitude and local conditions.

women.name: Madhya Pradesh Janani Suraksha Yojana
women.description: Under this scheme, cash incentives are provided to pregnant women and their motivators for delivery in government or accredited private hospitals.

women.name: NAMO Shree Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to ensure proper nutritional support to pregnant women and lactating mothers and encourage institutional deliveries. It provides financial assistance of ₹12,000/- to eligible women beneficiaries covering expenses from conception to delivery.

women.name: Protection Against Domestic Violence
women.description: The scheme "Protection Against Domestic Violence" by the Women and Child Development Department, Government of Haryana, aims to provide legal, emotional, and social support to women facing domestic violence through grievance redressal, offering protection, counseling, and mediation to victims.

women.name: Widow B.Ed Scheme-Rajasthan
women.description: In 2015-16, Rajasthan State started the "Widow B.Ed Scheme" for Widow/abandoned women.

women.name: Women In Science and Engineering-Societal Challenges with Opportunities Fellowship
women.description: The “WISE-SCOPE Fellowship” Program was started by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India with the aims to provide opportunity to Women Scientists and Technologists who have completed Ph.D. and want to utilize their S&T knowledge and expertise for the benefit of society.

women.name: Janani Express Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide free and timely transport to pregnant women for safe institutional deliveries.

women.name: Entrepreneurship Development by SC & ST Women in Science Technology Engineering Mathematics
women.description: ED/SC-ST- WISTEM)” is aimed for exploring the potential of entrepreneurship along with improvement in the livelihood options for unemployed SC & ST women in Science, Technology, Engineering & Mathematics (STEM) areas using tools of Science, Technology & Innovation.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Work Form Home-Job Work Yojana
women.description: The main objective of the "Mukhyamantri Work from Home" Scheme is to provide an opportunity for the women of the state to get employment sitting at home and to empower women by providing them with financial help by giving them work.

women.name: Vandan Matru Yojana
women.description: This scheme is a Gujarat government initiative providing financial assistance to pregnant and lactating women from economically weaker sections to promote maternal and child health.

women.name: Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Koshal Sanvardhan Yojana (RS-CSEP)
women.description: The Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Koshal Sanvardhan Yojana, offered by the Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Limited (RKCL), provides free training in spoken English and personality development for women and girls.

women.name: Mahila Swavlamban Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to women from rural and urban areas for undertaking economic activities, with support in the form of a subsidy and loans.

women.name: Nari Adalat
women.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
women.description: The scheme aims to provide an alternative grievance redressal mechanism for women at the grassroots level through mediation, counselling, and awareness of rights and entitlements.

women.name: Old Age And Destitute Pension
women.description: The Government of Puducherry introduced Old Age And Destitute Pension Scheme to extend a helping hand by way of monthly financial assistance to Old Age Persons/Widows/ Deserted Women/ Unmarried Women and Enuches so that they could defray some petty personal expenses without depending on others.

women.name: Lakshmir Bhandar Scheme
women.description: The "Lakshmir Bhandar" scheme is a flagship program to provide financial assistance to women from economically weaker sections of society, for the empowerment of women in the age group of 25-60 years, and enrolled in ‘Swasthya Sathi’.

women.name: Shramashakthi Special Women's Scheme
women.description: The "Shramashakthi Special Women's Scheme" is a special scheme for the economic empowerment of widowed, divorced, unmarried women of the minority community.

women.name: Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant & Lactating Women
women.description: The scheme “Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant & Lactating Women” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry. The objective of the scheme is to provide assistance for the well-being of Pregnant and Lactating mothers and their children.

women.name: Handicraft Rebate Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides 5–20% rebates on sales of handicraft goods to cooperatives, with higher incentives for women-led groups and during festivals. Applications are submitted online via e-Kutir.

women.name: Concessional Bus Travel Facility to Women above 60 years of age- Punjab
women.description: Under the scheme, all the women of 60 years and above residing in the State of Punjab have been given the benefit w.e.f. 12.11.1999 for 50% concession in bus fare in the Punjab Roadways and Pepsu Road Transport Corporation Buses.

women.name: Vidhva Vivah Uphar Yojana
women.description: The Rajasthan government's Social Justice and Empowerment Department launched the "Vidhva Vivah Uphar Yojana" program, a social welfare initiative that aims to improve the lives of widow women.

women.name: Ganga Swarupa Pension Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to widowed women, ensuring self-reliance through monthly pensions.

women.name: Nursing Kaushal College Jharkhand
women.description: The "Nursing Skill College" scheme provides skill-based nursing education and employment opportunities to young women, especially from disadvantaged backgrounds. The scheme offers free residential training, modern learning facilities, and placement support.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Matrupushti Uphar
women.description: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Matrupushti Uphar” was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura, to provide financial assistance of ₹500/- to pregnant women through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) for antenatal checkups at any health facility.

women.name: Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana Gujarat
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to ST families during the marriage of girls, providing ₹12,000 per couple as financial assistance to eligible tribal women across the state.

women.name: Subsidy Scheme For Establishment Of Goat Unit (10+1) For Scheduled Tribe Women
women.description: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme for Establishment of Goat Unit (10+1) for Scheduled Tribe Women” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to uplift Economically poor livestock breeders of Gujarat State.

women.name: Indira Gandhi Pyari Behna Sukh-Samman Nidhi Yojana
women.description: The "Indira Gandhi Pyari Behna Sukh-Samman Nidhi Yojana" is an initiative by the Himachal Pradesh government. The scheme recognizes the significant contributions of women in household work, cultural preservation, and family economy by providing a monthly assistance.

women.name: Mata Shabri Mahila Sashktikaran Yojana
women.description: The "Mata Shabri Mahila Sashktikaran Yojana" scheme aims to provide subsidies to purchase LPG gas connections and stoves, thereby reducing their dependence on firewood for cooking & improving the quality of life of women from scheduled caste families living below the poverty line (BPL).

women.name: Handloom Rebate Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides 10% special rebate for 120 festival days; Additional 5-15% permanent rebates for regular sales; Enhanced 20% rebates for women-led cooperatives. The scheme aims to enhance market competitiveness for Gujarat's handloom cooperatives and apex societies.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Vidwa Evam Ekal Naari Awas Yojana
women.description: The "Mukhyamantri Vidwa Evam Ekal Naari Awas Yojana" was launched by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Himachal Pradesh. The scheme aims to provide financial grants for the construction of houses to economically weak widows and single women.

women.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
women.ministry: Ministry Of Petroleum and Natural Gas
women.description: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (MOPNG), introduced the ‘"Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana 2.0" in India. The Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana (PMUY) is a scheme launched by the Government of India in 2016 to provide free LPG (liquefied petroleum gas) connections to women from below-poverty-line.

women.name: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar’s Electric Auto (e-Auto) Subsidy Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to socially and economically empower Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe women by supporting them in income-generating activities through electric autos. It provides a subsidy up to 75% of the cost (maximum ₹3,00,000/-) for electric autos to Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe women.

women.name: Goa (Technical/ Vocational Training To Sex Workers And Sexually Abused Women) Scheme, 2013 (PRABHAT)
women.description: The scheme provides technical/vocational training for sex workers and sexually abused women to enable them to earn for their livelihood through such technical/vocational training and skill. The department will take the assistance of members of reputed NGOs/Trust/Society/professionals/expert bodies.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Utkarsh Yojana
women.description: Mukhyamantri Mahila Utkarsh Yojana is a scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat to empower women in the state. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to women entrepreneurs and to promote their entrepreneurial spirit.

women.name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Yojana
women.description: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Yojana (MMKSY) is a scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat to empower women farmers in the state. The scheme was announced in the 2018-19 budget and is being implemented by the Department of Agriculture and Co-operation.

women.name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Sashaktikaran Yojana
women.description: Under this scheme, permanent training will be provided for the economic and social upliftment of women suffering from any form of violence and living in difficult circumstances so that they can get employment.

women.name: Mahila Samiriddhi Yojana for Minority Community
women.description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans up to ₹1,00,000/- per beneficiary are provided only to women entrepreneurs of the target group, either directly or through Self-Help Groups.

women.name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
women.description: The scheme aims to provide a secure savings option with assured returns for women. Through this scheme, 7.5% interest and flexible savings benefits are provided to women and minor girls.

women.name: Mahila Kamgar Kaushal Unnayan Evan Theka Shramik, Hamaal Tatha Ghareloo Mahila Kamgaar Parivar Sashaktikaran Yojana
women.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Mahila Kamgar Kaushal Unnayan Evan Theka Shramik, Hamaal Tatha Ghareloo Mahila Kamgaar Parivar Sashaktikaran Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

women.name: Mahila Nirman Shramik Vivah Yojana
women.description: The "Mahila Nirman Shramik Vivah Yojana" was launched by the Tripura Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, under the Labour Department of Tripura. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to registered female construction workers and maximum of two of their daughters.

women.name: Mahila Kisan Yojana
women.description: The scheme "Mahila Kisan Yojana" is an economic empowerment scheme by the Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation, Government of Haryana. Through this scheme, loans are provided to the women from Scheduled Castes for the betterment of their economic status through self-employment.

women.name: Alpsankhyak Muslim Parityaqta/Talaqshuda Mahila Sahayata Yojana
women.description: The objective of this scheme is to strengthen the economic condition of minority Muslim abandoned/divorced women and make them self-dependent by providing financial assistance of ₹25,000/-.

women.name: Formation of Mahila Mangal and Yuvak Mangal Dal
women.description: The scheme aims to form groups of interested women and men from Gram Panchayats across the state, who are 18 years of age or above, enabling them to avail the benefits of various schemes of the Youth Welfare and PRD Department and to collectively undertake business or livelihood activities.

women.name: Mahila Kisan Yojana (Maharashtra)
women.description: "Mahila Kisan Yojana" is implemented by the Dept. of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. The scheme aims to uplift the lifestyle of economically disadvantaged Charmakar communities. it supports the production and sale of various types of footwear and leather articles.

women.name: Mahila Samridhi Yojana (Maharashtra)
women.description: "Mahila Samridhi Yojana" is administered by the Dept. of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. The scheme aims to uplift economically weaker women from the Charmakar Community. Loans ranging from ₹25,000/- to ₹50,000/- are granted at a low interest rate of 4% p.a.

women.name: Mahila Adhikarita Yojana under NSKFDC- Haryana
women.description: Under this scheme, loan is provided to woman Safai Karamchari and their dependent daughters for projects with a maximum project cost of up to ₹2,00,000/- for small and petty trade/businesses, and various income-generating activities such as beauty parlors, boutiques, cosmetic shop, bangle shop, etc.

women.name: Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Cycle, Chhatari, Chappal/Joota Sahayta Yojana
women.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Cycle, Chhatari, Chappal/Joota Sahayta Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

women.name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Nirman Shramik Sammaan Yojana (HBOCWWB)
women.description: Under this scheme, registered female workers, who have minimum one-year’s regular membership, are being provided financial assistance of ₹5100/- for the purchase of Saree, Suit, Slippers, Raincoat, Umbrella, Sanitary Napkin and Kitchen utensil etc.

women.name: Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamal Shramik Prasuti Sahayta Yojana
women.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamal Shramik Prasuti Sahayta Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Rajya Nirashrit Mahila Samman Pension Yojana
women.description: “Mukhyamantri Rajya Nirashrit Mahila Samman Pension Yojana” is a Social Security Scheme by the Department of Women, Child Development & Social Security, Government of Jharkhand, that aims to provide social security to women who are unable to sustain themselves with their own resources.

women.name: Theka Shramik, Hamaal Shramik Evan Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Gambhir Bimaari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana
women.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Hamaal Shramik Evan Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Gambhir Bimaari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 05 June 2018.

women.name: Mahila Adhikarita Yojana (Gujarat Safai Kamdar Development Corporation)
women.description: "Mahila Adhikarita Yojana" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, is a centrally sponsored financial support scheme offering loans of ₹20,000/- at a subsidized interest rate to women sweepers and their dependents to promote self-reliance and upliftment.

women.name: Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Kaushal Sanvardhan Yojna -RS-CIT
women.description: The objective of Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Kaushal Sanvardhan Yojna is to provide empowerment to the girls and women of the state in the field of computers by providing free computer courses to them.

women.name: Hamaal Hetu Joota, Huk Evan Mahila Hamaal Hetu Soopa Aur Tokari Sahaayata Yojana
women.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Hamaal Hetu Joota, Huk Evan Mahila Hamaal Hetu Soopa Aur Tokari Sahaayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Udyami Yojana
women.description: This is a flagship scheme of the Bihar government aimed at promoting entrepreneurship and self-employment among the youth by providing financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up businesses.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Poshan Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to improve the health of pregnant and lactating women by providing nutritional food such as eggs twice a week and dates twice a week at Anganwadi Centres.

women.name: Mahila Bakri Palan
women.description: The scheme aims to empower women, especially abandoned, widowed, destitute, single, and disaster-affected women, by providing them support for goat rearing to generate livelihood and improve household income.

women.name: Mahila Swayamsiddha Yojana Rajasthan
women.description: The scheme objective is to provide free skill training and self-employment support to widowed, abandoned, and destitute women through voluntary organizations. The scheme is implemented by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department with financial assistance provided to participating NGOs.

women.name: Mahila Samruddhi Yojana (GSKVN)
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to female Safai Kamdars and their dependents to start small businesses. Through this scheme, loans for various self-employment ventures are provided to eligible female individuals.

women.name: Mahila Dairy Vikas Pariyojana - Uttarakhand
women.description: The scheme aims to empower rural women in Uttarakhand by promoting their active participation in the dairy sector through Women Milk Producers Cooperative Societies, enhancing milk production, and providing training, incentives, and awareness programs for sustainable livelihood development.

women.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana (GTKVN)
women.description: The scheme aims to empower women entrepreneurs from Thakor & Koli communities by providing access to micro-loans for self-employment. Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of low-interest loans is provided to eligible beneficiaries to set up small businesses based on their skills.

women.name: Mahila Samruddhi Yojana (DAADC)
women.description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment and financial independence among women from the Antyodaya Samaj, especially from Scheduled Castes. Under this scheme, loan up to ₹50,000/- is provided at a concessional interest rate to eligible women for starting small-scale businesses.

women.name: Mahila Samrudhhi Yojana (Gujarat Gopalak Vikas Nigam)
women.description: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women and make them self-reliant. Through this scheme, individual women entrepreneurs are provided with microfinance loans to start a business of their choice.

women.name: Mahila Samruddhi (Gujarat Backward Caste Development Corporation)
women.description: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women from the backward classes. Through this scheme, low-interest rate loans are provided to female beneficiaries.

women.name: Yuvak Mangal Dal and Mahila Mangal Dal Swavalamban Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to promote self-reliance among village-level male and female youth groups (Mangal Dals) by providing financial support for the purchase of essential materials, enabling them to become self-reliant and undertake community-based activities.

women.name: Rajya Samekit Sahkari Vikas Yojana - Ganga Gaay Mahila Dairy Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to promote dairy entrepreneurship among women, Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and general category members of cooperative societies by providing financial assistance through subsidies and loans for the purchase of milch cows and buffaloes.

women.name: Special Scholarship to SC Students in Selected Schools
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to SC students studying in famous private selected schools i.e. Doon School, Dehradun; Sofiya School, Abu; Mayo school, Ajmer; Sainik School, Balachadi; Mahila Sainik School, Kherva; Dist. Mehsana, etc. will be paid actual fees upto limit of ₹50,000/- p.a.

women.name: Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamaal Shramik Ke Bachcho Hetu Chhaatravrtti Yojana
women.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamaal Shramik Ke Bachcho Hetu Chhaatravrtti Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

women.name: Coir Vikas Yojana-Skill Upgradation and Mahila Coir Yojana
women.ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
women.description: The scheme “Skill Upgradation and Mahila Coir Yojana” is a component of “Coir Vikas Yojana” and the scheme was launched by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India.

women.name: Mahila Nursery Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to promote nursery establishment by providing women's groups with high-quality seedlings or saplings from certified sources, along with a fixed grant, technical support, and training to ensure effective nursery operations.

women.name: Grant-in-Aid Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Mahila Mandals
women.description: "Grant-in-Aid Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Mahila Mandals" aims to provide financial assistance to Mahila Mandals for training and self-employment activities. The scheme benefits registered Mahila Mandals in Goa, encouraging women's socio-economic development.

women.name: Mahila Samiriddhi Yojana for Backward Classes- Haryana
women.description: This scheme, implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, provides loans up to ₹1,25,000/- per beneficiary exclusively to women entrepreneurs of the target group, either directly or through self-help groups.

women.name: Mahila Samridhi Yojana under NSKFDC- Haryana
women.description: This scheme offers loans up to ₹1,00,000/- to women Safai Karamcharis or their dependents for economic development through self-employment initiatives, such as establishing cloth shops, dairies, tea shops, bangle shops, beauty parlours, papad making, basketry, tailoring shops, etc.

women.name: Grant-in-Aid Scheme To Provide Financial Assistance To The Mahila Mandals/ Women’s Self-help Groups (SWAWLAMBHAN)
women.description: The SWAWLAMBHAN Scheme by the Govt. of Goa provides financial assistance to Mahila Mandals/Self-Help Groups for training/orientation for members of the Mahila Mandal/Self-Help Groups for generating their own activity for self-employment.

women.name: Pragati Scholarship (81 for Uttarakhand girl students (Diploma) and 50 for Graduation)
women.description: The scheme aims to encourage higher education among girl students of the state by providing financial assistance in the form of scholarship. Under this scheme, scholarships are awarded to 81 girl students enrolled in Diploma courses and 50 girl students enrolled in Graduation courses in Uttarakhand.

women.name: Girl Education Promotion (Bicycle Scheme)
women.description: The scheme aims to promote girls' education in the state by providing financial assistance for the purchase of bicycles to girl students studying in Class 9 in government and government-aided secondary schools.

women.name: Chief Minister’s Girl Child Protection Scheme-II
women.description: The "Chief Minister’s Girl Child Protection Scheme-I" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to girl children of poor families as well as to promote girl child education & eradicate female infanticide.

women.name: Post Graduate Indira Gandhi Scholarship For Single Girl Child
women.description: A scholarship scheme by the University Grants Commission for Girl students who are admitted in the first year of PG courses in any designated university or a postgraduate college, and happen to be the only girl child in the family. The amount of fellowship is ₹ 36,200/- per annum.

women.name: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship For Single Girl Child
women.description: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship for Single Girl Child (SJSGC) is a Fellowship Scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education, for pursuing research work leading to the award of a Ph.D. degree. The target group of this scheme is the ‘single girl child'.

women.name: Girl Students Health & Hygiene Scheme
women.description: The scheme “Girl Students Health & Hygiene Scheme” was announced by the Department of School Education, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh in 2013 for the girl students studying in classes 6-12. The scheme's focus was to retain, maintain hygiene, and continue education throughout the year.

women.name: ST Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11th
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Tribe girl students of Madhya Pradesh enrolled in Class 11 to encourage them to continue their education and prevent dropouts.

women.name: Education Development Scholarship for Single Girl Child
women.description: The scheme was launched by School Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh to ensure continuity of education for girl students who are the only daughters of their parents. Under this scheme, eligible girl students who are only child of their parents receive a scholarship of ₹5,000/- per year.

women.name: Bicycle Distribution Scheme for Girl Students of Economically Weaker Section
women.description: Under this scheme, free bicycles will be distributed to 5,800 girl students belonging to the Economically Weaker Section (EWS), who are studying in government schools from Class 6 to Class 8, to facilitate their commute between home and school.

women.name: SC Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11th
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste girl students of Madhya Pradesh enrolled in Class 11 to encourage them to continue their education and prevent dropouts.

women.name: CBSE Merit Scholarship Scheme For Single Girl Child
women.description: The scheme aims to promote girls’ education and provide ₹1,000 per month to meritorious single girl students studying in classes 11th and 12th.

women.name: Swami Vivekananda Single Girl Child Fellowship for Research in Social Sciences
women.description: A fellowship scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC) for Single Girl Child for research in Social Sciences with an aim to compensate for direct costs of higher education, especially for such girls who happen to be the only girl child in their family.

women.name: Free Cycles to SC Girl Students Studying in Standard IX (Sarasvati Sadhna Yojana)
women.description: The “Free Cycles to SC girl students studying in Standard IX” scheme is administered by the Directorate of Scheduled Caste Welfare, Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of Gujarat. Under this scheme, free bicycles are given to scheduled caste girl students who are studying in Stand

women.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Diploma)
women.description: A scholarship scheme by AICTE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical diploma course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for a period of max. of 3 years for first-year students and a max. of 2 years for second-year admitted students (later entry).

women.name: Financial Assistance for Girl Child Attend Her Age of 18
women.description: The Financial Assistance for Girl Child Attend Her Age of 18 scheme provides financial assistance in the form of a fixed deposit of ₹1,00,000/- for each female child of a registered worker or spouse who has undergone a family planning operation after the birth of one female child.

women.name: Financial Incentives To Mothers Who Deliver A Girl Child (Mamta)
women.description: The objective of the Mamta Scheme is aimed at improving the Female Child Sex Ratio in the State. The scheme is open to all mothers who deliver a live Girl Child (max. 02 deliveries) in a registered medical institution. The scheme shall be implemented through the ICDS.

women.name: Award of Attendance Scholarship to Girl Students in the Middle Stage of Education
women.description: "Award of Attendance Scholarship to Girl Students in the Middle Stage of Education" was launched by the Directorate of School Education, UT of Puducherry aims to raise the enrolment of girls in schools in the age group of 11-14 years in the middle stage of education, and to avoid dropout.

women.name: Gargi Puruskar Yojana
women.description: The benefit of Gargi Puraskar Yojana is given every year to the beneficiary girl child of Rajasthan on the day of Basant Panchami. This time also the beneficiary girl students were taken on a tour of the girl students on the occasion of Basant Panchami very year.

women.name: Grant Of Retention Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Girl Students
women.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to Scheduled Caste Girls Students to pursue their studies in Primary Education. Because of this assistance, the parents of those students may not lose any income that they would otherwise get by sending their girls to work.

women.name: Award of Opportunity Cost to Parents of Scheduled Caste Girl Students
women.description: The objective of the scheme is to financially assist the SC parents for sending school their daughters who otherwise earn livelihood for the family engaging themselves in menial labour.

women.name: Attendance Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students with Disabilities of Rural Areas
women.description: The objective of this scheme is to uplift the status of the girls with disabilities in the rural areas & also to make them reliant by paying incentives in the form of Attendance Scholarship to these girls.

women.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Degree)
women.description: A scholarship scheme by MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical degree course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for max. 4 years for first-year admitted students and max. 3 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry.

women.name: State Merit Scholarship to Under Graduate Girls Students
women.description: "Merit Scholarship to Undergraduate Girl Students"  aims to promote higher education among meritorious girl students by providing a scholarship amount of ₹3,000 per annum to 10 eligible girl students per government college who have excelled in their 10+2 examination.

women.name: Economic Help To Sahariya Tribal Girl Students (Class 11 And 12)
women.description: Rajasthan Government started a scholarship for Sahariya tribal girls' higher education (Class 11 and 12).

women.name: Scholarship Scheme for Girl Children of Workers of Jute Mills/MSME JDP Units
women.description: National Jute Board Act, 2008 provides to “secure better working conditions and provisions and improve amenities and incentives for workers engaged in the jute industry.”

women.name: Nandaa Gaura Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for upto 2 girls in a family. Assistance is given in 2 installments per girl child: 1st installment of ₹11,000 is provided at the time of birth if girl is born in a hospital/ANM center & 2nd installment of ₹51,000 is given when girl passes Class 12th.

women.name: Gargi Sanskrit Balika Chhaatravrtti Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to encourage and motivate girl students studying in Classes 6 to 12 at Sanskrit schools in the state by providing financial scholarships to support their education.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Konya Atmonirbhor Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide a free Scooty to the meritorious girl students, which will be useful for them to travel to their College.

women.name: Matritva, Shishu Evam Baalika Madad Yojana
women.description: "Maatrtv, Shishu Evan Baalika Madad Yojana" is a initiative of Uttar Pradesh state Government to provide the financial assistance to the mother and her girl child.

women.name: Chhatraon Ke Liye Protsahan Rashi
women.description: In the "Chhatraon Ke Liye Protsahan Rashi" scheme to encourages girl students to study agriculture subject and provides financial assistance to economically disadvantaged students who may face challenges in accessing education due to financial constraints.

women.name: Savitribai Phule Scholarship For V.J.N.T. And S.B.C. Girl Students Studying In 5th To 7th Standard
women.description: Savitribai Phule Scholarship is a Scholarship Scheme by the Social Justice and Special Assistance Dept., Govt. of Maharashtra, to encourage the enrollment and to decrease the dropout ratio of Girl Students of Maharashtra from Vimukta Jati and Nomadic Tribes and Special Backward Classes.

women.name: Balika Samrithi Yojana
women.description: “Balika Samrithi Yojana” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry was introduced to improve the status of the girl child and provide nutritious food to the girl child. Financial assistance of ₹500 in the form of a National Savings Certificate is provided to lactating mothers.

women.name: Mukhya Mantrir Nijut Moina Aasoni
women.description: The scheme aims to support ten lakh girl students with financial grants as admission incentives for Higher Secondary, Graduation, and Post-Graduation studies to eradicate child marriage. It benefits unmarried girl students domiciled in Assam with monthly financial assistance.

women.name: Ladli Laxmi Yojana
women.description: Ladli Lakshmi Yojana has been started in Madhya Pradesh for Girl Child in 2007.

women.name: Financial Assistance For The Marriage Of Daughters Of Poor Widows And Orphan Girls
women.description: This is a welfare scheme by the GNCTD to provide financial assistance to poor widows for performing the marriage of their daughters and to provide financial assistance to the guardians including Homes/Institutions or foster parents of an orphan girl or an orphan girl for her marriage.

women.name: ARAVANAIPPU
women.description: "ARAVANAIPPU", a scheme by the Dept of Women and Child Development, Govt of Puducherry aims to improve the status of the girl child and provide nutritious food; financial assistance of ₹1200 is offered to lactating mothers. The girl child of the applicant should be born after 1-4-2005.

women.name: Vidhya Sadhana Yojana Gujarat
women.description: Under this scheme, free bicycles are gifted to girl students across Gujarat to reduce school dropouts among scheduled tribe girls after class 8.

women.name: Vidya Scheme
women.description: Vidya scheme under the Education Department, Government of Arunachal Pradesh is a scheme where a girl child who is studying in Class VI is provided with an incentive of Rs. 10,000/- as fixed deposit in SBI in the name of individual girl child till she completes Class – XII.

women.name: Maanki Munda Scholarship for Female Students
women.description: The "Maanki Munda Scholarship for Female Students" scheme was launched by the Department of Higher & Technical Education, Govt. of Jharkhand. This scholarship program aims to make the girl students aware of enrollment in technical education, making them self-reliant & providing financial assistance.

women.name: Rishi and Milan Khosla Scholarship Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to promote higher education among girl students in the state by providing scholarships to those pursuing their first year of post-graduation in various government colleges across Uttarakhand.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Alpasankhyak Medhwi Balika Protsahan Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial incentives to meritorious girl students belonging to minority communities based on their performance in the High School Examination or its equivalent (Munshi/Maulvi) and Intermediate Examination or its equivalent (Alim).

women.name: National Scheme Of Incentive To Girls For Secondary Education
women.description: The National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education promotes the girl child's enrolment of 14-18 years age group at secondary stage, who passes class 8th and subsequently drops out for various socio-economic reasons.

women.name: Chhattisgarh Mukhyamantri Kanya Vivah Yojana
women.description: In view of the difficulty faced by poor families regarding the marriage of the girl child, the Mukhyamantri Kanya Vivah Yojana has been implemented.

women.name: Devnarayan Chhatra Cycle Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides free bicycles to girl students studying in Class 9 in government schools of Rajasthan who belong to the Special Backward Classes or specific communities such as Banjara, Baldia, Labana-Gadiya Lohar, Gadolia, Gujar Gurjar, Raiko, Rebari (Debasi).

women.name: Mukhyamantri Mahalakshmi Kit Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to improve the health and well-being of both mothers and their newborn girl children by providing essential item kits after the institutional delivery of pregnant women registered at an Anganwadi Centre.

women.name: Pratibha Kiran Scholarship
women.description: Pratibha Kiran Scholarship has been launched by the Government of Madhya Pradesh. Through this scheme, scholarship will be provided every year to girl students living below the poverty line.

women.name: Cycle Distribution Scheme
women.description: Under this scheme, tribal girl students in Class 11th who travel more than 2 km to reach school and did not receive a bicycle in Class 9th are given a cash amount equivalent to the cost of a bicycle.

women.name: Rani Laxmi Bai Self-Defense Training
women.description: The scheme aims to provide free self-defense skills training (including judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) to girl students in upper primary and secondary schools across Uttarakhand.

student.name: Margadeepam Scholarship
student.description: The scheme aims to provide educational financial support to minority community students in Kerala. It offers ₹1,500/- annual scholarship to eligible students from Class 1st to Class 8th studying in government and government-aided schools.

student.name: Distance Education Scholarship–Scholarship For Disabled Students Pursuing Degree, PG Courses
student.description: The scheme “Distance Education Scholarship–Scholarship for Disabled Students Pursuing Degree, PG Courses” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

student.name: State Horticulture Scholarship
student.description: The “State Horticulture Scholarship” is a scholarship scheme, launched by the Department of Horticulture, Government of Nagaland to provide scholarship/stipend to students who are pursuing B.Sc. (Horticulture) M.Sc. (Horticulture) Ph.D. (Horticulture) courses.

student.name: Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme
student.description: "Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme" provides financial assistance for the education and training of differently-abled children, who are regular students in a school or college. The application needs to be submitted to the District Office, Panchayat and Social Welfare / Janpad Panchayat Office.

student.name: Combined Merit Scholarship
student.description: The scheme aims to provide merit-based scholarship to students of Assam studying in first semester degree and master degree courses in recognized institutions. It benefits academically meritorious students who have obtained at least 60% marks in their last qualifying examination.

student.name: Scholarship to Disabled Students
student.description: The scheme "Scholarship to Disabled Students" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department aims to provide financial assistance to students with disabilities. Through this scheme, annual scholarships are offered to support the education of eligible students from Class 1 onwards.

student.name: Naunihal Scholarship Yojana
student.description: Chhattisgarh Naunihal Scholarship Scheme has been started by the Government of Chhattisgarh in 2017.

student.name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship Program
student.description: Begum Hazrat Mahal National scholarship is a scholarship scheme also known as Maulana Azad National scholarship scheme was first announced on 3rd May 2003. It is a national level scholarship started for the benefit of the girl’s student belonging to the minority communities.

student.name: Sanskrit Scholarship
student.description: Under this scheme, students studying Sanskrit at various levels—Post Graduate (M.A. Classic), Acharya, Graduate (B.A. Classic), Shastri, Uttar Madhyama, Purva Madhyama, and Prathama—in any government or aided non-government college receive a monthly scholarship of ₹300/- for 10 months.

student.name: Pratibha Kiran Scholarship
student.description: Pratibha Kiran Scholarship has been launched by the Government of Madhya Pradesh. Through this scheme, scholarship will be provided every year to girl students living below the poverty line.

student.name: Chief Minister Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme "Chief Minister Scholarship Scheme" by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students for pursuing medical, engineering, diploma, and higher education courses.

student.name: Lakshadweep Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The Lakshadweep Scholarship Scheme is a government initiative aimed at providing financial assistance to students from Lakshadweep pursuing higher education.

student.name: Nagaland State Merit Scholarship
student.description: The Directorate of Higher Education has launched the Nagaland State Merit Scholarship for the students of classes from 11th to 12th and UG Degree to PG degree so that they will be able to secure their scholarship rights or seats after getting online registration under this scholarship.

student.name: Sudakshya For Girls Child Scholarship
student.description: This scholarship provides financial assistance to all deserving students who want to pursue higher studies.  Under this scholarship scheme, the students fulfilling the eligibility criteria will receive a maintenance allowance and other benefits.

student.name: Merit Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions
student.description: "Merit Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹600/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized polytechnic institutions in Chhattisgarh.

student.name: Shridev Suman State Merit Scholarship
student.description: The scheme provides monthly scholarship of ₹1,000/- to meritorious students who qualify in eligibility test conducted by SCERT Uttarakhand. The scholarship is awarded to the next 5 students from each development block of Uttarakhand who are not selected for the Dr. Shivanand Nautiyal Scholarship.

student.name: National Talent Scholarship Undergraduate
student.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
student.description: The scholarship aims to support meritorious students by providing financial assistance of ₹3,000 per month during their undergraduate studies.

student.name: Chief Minister's Scholarship Scheme
student.description: Under this scheme, financial support is provided to students from Class XI to Ph.D. level. It offers a fixed annual scholarship of ₹6,000 for post-matric studies, which is paid directly into the students’ bank accounts. This scholarship is often provided in addition to other scholarships.

student.name: Vyasakabi Fakir Mohan Bhasabruti Scholarship
student.description: "Vyasakabi Fakir Mohan Bhasabruti Scholarship" is a Scholarship by the Higher Education Department, Govt. of Odisha. The objective of the scheme is the promotion of the Odia Language by way of encouraging meritorious students to take up higher studies in Odia Language at the U.G. and P.G. levels.

student.name: Primary Education Scholarship (Madhya Pradesh)
student.description: The "Primary Education Scholarship" scheme provides ₹150/- annually to students from De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic communities who are studying in classes 1st to 5th.  The scholarship distribution is managed through the Directorate of Public Education, Government of Madhya Pradesh.

student.name: General Pre Matric Scholarship-Uttar Pradesh
student.description: The Uttar Pradesh Social Welfare Department offers a Pre Matric Scholarship for General category students. This scholarship aims to financially assist students from these categories to pursue secondary education and complete their matriculation.

student.name: State Research Scholarship
student.description: This scholarship is specially designed for students who are pursuing research work. Under the scheme, beneficiaries will get cash awards to conduct their research work.

student.name: Merit cum Means Scholarship: Engineering University
student.description: "Merit cum Means Scholarship: Engineering University" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹1,000/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized engineering universities in Chhattisgarh.

student.name: OBC Pre Matric Scholarship-Uttar Pradesh
student.description: The Uttar Pradesh Social Welfare Department offers a Pre Matric Scholarship for Other Backward Class (OBC) students. This scholarship aims to financially assist students from these categories to pursue secondary education and complete their matriculation.

student.name: Scholarship For Differently Abled Students
student.description: The scheme “Scholarship for Differently Abled Students” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

student.name: State Disability Scholarship (Scholarship for Persons with Disabilities)
student.description: The scheme “State Disability Scholarship” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Nagaland to provide financial assistance to students from Class I to Class VIII who have a disability of 40% and above.

student.name: State Agriculture Scholarship for B.Sc. & M.Sc. Agriculture
student.description: The scheme “State Agriculture Scholarship for B.Sc. & M.Sc. Agriculture” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Government of Nagaland to provide educational assistance to students who are undergoing undergraduate (B.Sc. Agriculture) and post-graduate programme (M.Sc. Agriculture).

student.name: Post Matric Scholarship for Students belonging to Scheduled Caste Community
student.description: The scheme "Post Matric Scholarship for Students belonging to Scheduled Caste Community" was launched by the Mizoram Scholarship Board, Government of Mizoram. The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to students belonging to Scheduled Castes pursuing post-matriculation.

student.name: Scholarship For Transgender Students
student.description: The scheme “Scholarship for Transgender Students” was launched by the Social Justice Department, Government of Kerala for providing scholarships to Transgender students from 7th standard onwards studying in State Government/ Government aided/ Self Financing schools.

student.name: Rajarshri Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Merit Scholarship
student.description: The "Rajarshri Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Merit Scholarship" is an initiative by the Maharashtra Government, specifically designed to encourage scheduled caste students to pursue higher secondary education.  The scholarship aims to enhance the educational standards & competitiveness of students.

student.name: Prathibha Scholarship Programme
student.description: Prathibha Scholarship Programme is aimed at motivating bright Students to higher studies in Science by awarding Scholarships. Prathibha Scholars are also provided opportunities to attend Science Orientation Programmes and interact with pioneers in Science through the SPEED Scheme.

student.name: National Talent Scholarship Postgraduate
student.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
student.description: Merit-based support through the National Talent Scholarship to the post-graduate students seeking admission in agricultural universities in a state other than the state of their domicile through ICAR All India Entrance Examination (AIEE).

student.name: Fellowship Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The "Fellowship Scholarship Scheme" by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to provide financial help to students by granting an annual monetary award to those who secure 70% or more marks in Class 10th and pursue higher education.

student.name: State Medical Scholarship (Scholarship Scheme for MBBS & Allied Courses, Nursing and Paramedical Students)
student.description: The “State Medical Scholarship” is a scholarship scheme, launched by the Department of Health & Family Welfare, Government of Nagaland. Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to students who are pursuing MBBS & Allied Courses, Nursing and Paramedical courses.

student.name: Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme “Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra Scholarship Scheme” was started by the Department of Education, Himachal Pradesh. Under the scheme, scholarship is given to the students of Himachal Pradesh who are studying in Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra.

student.name: SC/ST Pre Matric Scholarship - Uttar Pradesh
student.description: The Uttar Pradesh Social Welfare Department offers a Pre Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) students. This scholarship aims to financially assist students from these categories to pursue secondary education and complete their matriculation.

student.name: Indian Agricultural Research Institute - Scholarship
student.ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
student.description: The Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) Junior and Senior Scholarship shall be awarded to M.Sc. and Ph.D. students admitted under General Open Competition Scheme.

student.name: Urdu Scholarship- Rajasthan
student.description: The scheme aims to promote the Urdu language among female students at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Under this scheme, a monthly scholarship is provided to undergraduate and postgraduate students who are studying Urdu as an optional subject.

student.name: Post Metric Scholarship - Madhya Pradesh
student.description: Under the Post-Matric Scholarship is a Madhya Pradesh Government initiative to provide financial assistance to economically weaker social class students to pursue higher education after matriculation.

student.name: Bhagwan Budhdh Scholarship
student.description: Bhagavan Buddha Post SSC Scholarship launched by the Ministry of Education, Government of Gujarat. A scheme was introduced with the aim to encourage SC girl students to continue their higher studies after SSC.

student.name: Devnarayan Post Matric Scholarship Scheme
student.description: In Rajasthan, the Post-matriculation scholarship scheme is run by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment for the educational upliftment of students.

student.name: Devnarayan Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
student.description: In Rajasthan, the Pre-Matriculation scholarship scheme is run by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment for the educational upliftment of Very Backward Class students.

student.name: Sports Scholarship Jharkhand
student.description: The "Sports Scholarship" scheme implemented by the Department of Welfare, Government of Jharkhand aims to boost sports participation among Scheduled Tribe students. It provides scholarships, incentives, and essential sports materials for eligible participants.

student.name: Award of Scholarship to Differently Abled Person Students
student.description: The scheme “Award of Scholarship to Differently Abled Person Students” by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry is introduced to provide scholarship to the differently abled students, studying from Class 1st upto Postgraduate/ Professional courses.

student.name: Prabhuddha Overseas Scholarship
student.description: The PRABHUDDHA OVERSEAS SCHOLARSHIP scheme selects around 250 undergraduate and 150 postgraduate and PhD students from the SC/ST communities, providing them with financial assistance. The initiative aims to support deserving students in pursuing their academic aspirations.

student.name: Post-matric Scholarship Scheme- Uttar Pradesh
student.description: The UP scholarship program was started by the state of Uttar Pradesh to increase literacy rates and generate a skilled youth force to boost social and economic growth.

student.name: AICTE-Swanath Scholarship Scheme For Students
student.description: A scholarship scheme by the Student Development Cell (StDC) of All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) to provide encouragement and support to orphans, wards of parents who died due to Covid-19, wards of Armed Forces, and Central Paramilitary Forces martyred in action (Shaheed).

student.name: Scholarship To 2 Years Pre-Service Student Teachers Undergoing D.El.Ed Programme At DIETs And CTTC Sohra
student.description: The scheme “Scholarship to 2 Years Pre-Service Student Teachers undergoing D.El.Ed Programme at DIETs and CTTC Sohra” was launched by the Dept. of Education, Govt. of Meghalaya in 2012. The scheme offers a scholarship of ₹5000 p.m. for 2 years (10 months per year) to attract the state's best talent.

student.name: State Merit Scholarship to Under Graduate Girls Students
student.description: "Merit Scholarship to Undergraduate Girl Students"  aims to promote higher education among meritorious girl students by providing a scholarship amount of ₹3,000 per annum to 10 eligible girl students per government college who have excelled in their 10+2 examination.

student.name: Scholarship/Stipend to SC Students for ITI/Professional Courses (Swami Vivekanand Scholarship)
student.description: Under the scheme, a monthly stipend/scholarship will be given to Scheduled Caste Category students who are studying professional courses in Government or Private Industrial Training Institute (ITI).

student.name: Merit Based Scholarship Scheme for Dhangar Students
student.description: "Merit Based Scholarship Scheme for Dhangar Students" by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Government of Goa aims to motivate students by providing merit-based awards and financial incentives (ranging from ₹5,000/- to ₹20,000/-) to high-performing students who are economically weak.

student.name: AICTE – Saksham Scholarship Scheme For Specially-Abled Student (Diploma)
student.description: Saksham is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Education, implemented by AICTE, aimed at providing encouragement and support to specially-abled children to pursue technical education. This is an attempt to give every young specially-abled student the opportunity to study further.

student.name: Chief Minister Higher Education Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme was launched by the Higher Education Department, Government of Rajasthan. This scheme aims to enhance educational levels and provide scholarship to children from low-income families.

student.name: Jharkhand State Scheduled Tribe Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The "Jharkhand State Scheduled Tribe Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme" aims to promote education and reduce dropout rates among Scheduled Tribe students. It provides financial assistance to students from Class 1st to 10th who are studying in government schools in Jharkhand.

student.name: Savitribai Phule Scholarship For V.J.N.T And S.B.C Girls Students Studying In 8th To 10 Std
student.description: Savitribai Phule Scholarship is a Scholarship Scheme by the Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Govt. of Maharashtra, to encourage enrollment and to decrease the dropout ratio of Girls in education.

student.name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC students (Delhi)
student.description: The scheme "Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students" aims to support SC students financially for post-matriculation studies. Benefits include fee reimbursement and monthly allowances. Intended beneficiaries are SC students with a family income below ₹2,50,000/- annually.
